howItWorks.intro: This rv payload capacity calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Remaining Payload
rules.formula: Remaining = GVWR - Dry Weight - Passengers - Water
rules.explanation: Subtract fixed loads from total cargo capacity.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Cargo Carrying Capacity = GVWR minus the dry weight of the RV.

faq.q: How much do water and passengers weigh?
faq.a: Water weighs 8.34 lbs/gallon. Passengers average 175 lbs each per RVIA standard.

howWeCalculate.intro: This rv payload capacity calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
